dialogText1:
Many Remans settled on Crateris after the fallout from Shinzon's rebellion. While they were safe from the destruction of Romulus and Remus, Crateris is a bleak world with little in the way of habitable land. There are ample mineral deposits, which the Remans mine and sell for food and other necessities, but their lives there are harsh and unforgiving.

Anyone who could survive on Crateris for as long as the Remans have has strength. We could use that strength in our search for a homeworld -- and I know the Remans have no love for the Tal Shiar.

Go to Crateris. Talk to the Remans. Show them we are sincere and that we need their support.
dialogText2: <font style="Mission_Info">Proceed to the Crateris System in the Beta Quadrant and attempt to contact the Reman colonists there.</font>

text: Acquired mission: Crossroads at Crateris
rawLine: [837831292,20260719T225452,0,@,@,,,Mission]Acquired mission: Crossroads at Crateris

speaker: Tovan Khev
text:
The Tal Shiar are approaching Crateris, and they've already engaged a group of Reman vessels in orbit.

The Remans are sending out a general distress call. We have to help them!
rawLine:
[837831345,20260719T225545,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]The Tal Shiar are approaching Crateris, and they've already engaged a group of Reman vessels in orbit.

options.displayString: Open a channel to the Decimus.

dialogText1:
The Decimus is too heavily damaged. They can't respond to our hails.

They won't last much longer if we don't help them.

Assist the Reman ships.

text: Lead the way. We'll follow your attack vector and provide support fire.
rawLine: [837831383,20260719T225623,0,@,@,,,Mission]Lead the way. We'll follow your attack vector and provide support fire.

text: The Decimus is nearby and needs our help. They're losing structural integrity.
rawLine: [837831415,20260719T225655,0,@,@,,,Mission]The Decimus is nearby and needs our help. They're losing structural integrity.

dialogText1:
Thank you for your assistance, R.R.W. explicit profanities. We're continuing emergency repairs, but most of our major systems are offline.

The Tal Shiar sent detachments to the surface, and our colony is not responding to hails. With our transporters down and shuttlebay damaged, I cannot send a security team to investigate.

The Tal Shiar have never been so bold.

options.displayString: They plan to destroy your colony.

speaker: Commander Khiy
text:

[837831441,20260719T225721,0,Commander Khiy@,@,,,NPC]Thank you for your assistance, R.R.W. explicit profanities. We're continuing emergency repairs, but most of our major systems are offline.

selectedChoice: They plan to destroy your colony.

dialogText1:
How can you be so certain?

It doesn't make sense. They've left us alone for years.

What would they gain by destroying our home? We keep to ourselves and we do not challenge the Tal Shiar.
lastResponseDisplayString: They plan to destroy your colony.

dialogText1:
With all due respect, we've seen this before.

The Tal Shiar destroyed our colony on Virinat without warning.

If we don't get your people off Crateris immediately, they will be defenseless when the invasion force arrives.

speaker: Tovan Khev
text:

The Tal Shiar destroyed our colony on Virinat without warning. 

If we don't get your people off Crateris immediately, they will be defenseless when the invasion force arrives.

selectedChoice: Tovan is telling the truth.

dialogText1:
Invasion force? We aren't in any position to begin an evacuation! The head of our fleet, Obisek, and most of our ships are on maneuvers out of the system! They can't possibly return in time!

Until we re-establish communication with the colony, our priority must be to protect the people on the surface.
lastResponseDisplayString: Tovan is telling the truth.

dialogText1:
Find Zden. He will help you.

He resides near the communication tower on the outskirts of the colony. If we re-establish communication, then we can formulate a plan.

speaker: Commander Khiy
text:
Zden is to the northwest near a force field.

If planetary communications are disabled, you'll need his help to bring the transmitter back online. 

We'll do our best to keep more Tal Shiar from beaming down, but I can't promise we'll be able to stop them. 

Locate Zden.

objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Tech from Colony

text: There's some odd technology readings near the colony's southwest outflow drainage pipe. We should check it out.
rawLine: [837831533,20260719T225853,0,@,@,,,Mission]There's some odd technology readings near the colony's southwest outflow drainage pipe. We should check it out.

speaker: Subcommander Kail
text: The alloys used in this device are normally only in the Delta Quadrant. We know  the Iconians have gateways that allow them to travel anywhere they wish. It would be reasonable to assume they have had influence in the Delta Quadrant as well.
rawLine: [837831548,20260719T225908,0,Subcommander Kail@,@,,,NPC]The alloys used in this device are normally only in the Delta Quadrant. We know  the Iconians have gateways that allow them to travel anywhere they wish. It would be reasonable to assume they have had influence in the Delta Quadrant as well.

dialogText1:
Thank you, stranger. I don't understand why this is happening.

You're obviously not with the Tal Shiar.

Why are you here and what do you want?

options.displayString: Commander Khiy sent us to help you.

speaker: Zden
text:
Thank you, stranger. I don't understand why this is happening.

You're obviously not with the Tal Shiar. 

Why are you here and what do you want?
rawLine:
[837831596,20260719T225956,0,Zden@,@,,,NPC]Thank you, stranger. I don't understand why this is happening.

selectedChoice: Commander Khiy sent us to help you.

dialogText1:
Commander Khiy? Good.

Follow me and then explain what's going on.

We should get inside the security field before more Tal Shiar arrive.

Follow Zden through the security field

speaker: Zden
text: Follow me.

speaker: Zden
text: Veril! There you are.

speaker: Veril
text: Father!

speaker: Zden
text: I'm glad you're safe.

speaker: Zden
text: Now, tell us what's happened.
rawLine: [837831623,20260719T230023,0,Zden@,@,,,NPC]Now, tell us what's happened.

dialogText1:
We need to know more.

It's clear that our colony is under attack, but why are the Tal Shiar doing this.

Why attack Crateris? What are they after?

options.displayString: It's an invasion. They're taking Crateris.

speaker: Zden
text:
We need to know more.

It's clear that our colony is under attack, but why are the Tal Shiar doing this. 

Why attack Crateris? What are they after?
rawLine:
[837831648,20260719T230048,0,Zden@,@,,,NPC]We need to know more. 

It's clear that our colony is under attack, but why are the Tal Shiar doing this. 

Why attack Crateris? What are they after?

selectedChoice: It's an invasion. They're taking Crateris.

dialogText1:
There's no reason for the Tal Shiar to attack Crateris.

We've been an established colony for over twenty-three years! We were given permission to settle here by Donatra!

Why would the Tal Shiar attack a colony of their own people?
lastResponseDisplayString: It's an invasion. They're taking Crateris.

options.displayString: They didn't give a reason when they destroyed our colony on Virinat.

speaker: Zden
text:
There's no reason for the Tal Shiar to attack Crateris.

Why would the Tal Shiar attack a colony of their own people?

selectedChoice: They didn't give a reason when they destroyed our colony on Virinat.

dialogText1:
So the rumors are true.

I told you, father, the Tal Shiar have declared war on our people!

They're going to kill us!
lastResponseDisplayString: They didn't give a reason when they destroyed our colony on Virinat.

options.displayString: They seem more interested in abducting people.

text:

dialogText1:
It doesn't make any sense.

We aren't a threat to the Tal Shiar. What do they have to gain?

They can't do this without anyone noticing.
lastResponseDisplayString: They seem more interested in abducting people.

options.displayString: Worry about that later. We need to evacuate now!

dialogText1:
Evacuate? We must inform the council.

Who is going to listen to my order to evacuate?

Obisek isn't here. He left Khiy in charge. Why doesn't he give the order to evacuate?
lastResponseDisplayString: Worry about that later. We need to evacuate now!

options.displayString: The Tal Shiar knocked out communications.

speaker: Zden
text:
Evacuate? We must inform the council.

Who is going to listen to my order to evacuate? 

Obisek isn't here. He left Khiy in charge. Why doesn't he give the order to evacuate?

selectedChoice: The Tal Shiar knocked out communications.

dialogText1:
That explains a lot.

When we couldn't reach anyone, Slamek said he was going to check on the transmitter. He hasn't come back yet.

We should find him and see if we can get communications back online.
lastResponseDisplayString: The Tal Shiar knocked out communications.

options.displayString: Is there any other way to warn the rest of the colony?

speaker: Veril
text:
That explains a lot.

When we couldn't reach anyone, Slamek said he was going to check on the transmitter. He hasn't come back yet. 

We should find him and see if we can get communications back online.

When we couldn't reach anyone, Slamek said he was going to check on the transmitter. He hasn't come back yet.

selectedChoice: Is there any other way to warn the rest of the colony?

dialogText1:
Without the transmitter we'll have to start contacting colonists individually. The word will spread, but it will take some time.

Obviously something is going on, but I'm not the one to order an evacuation. The fleet or the council should make that determination.
lastResponseDisplayString: Is there any other way to warn the rest of the colony?

options.displayString: Start contacting everyone you can. We'll check on the transmitter.

dialogText1:
You'll need help. If you're going out to the transmitter, I'm going with you.

Maybe we can find Slamek there.
lastResponseDisplayString: Start contacting everyone you can. We'll check on the transmitter.

selectedChoice: We appreciate the help.

dialogText1:
Veril, you should stay here. Let these people handle this.

We don't know the whole story yet. We need more information. We need to know what the Tal Shiar want!

At least stay behind the security field until we hear from the council.
lastResponseDisplayString: We appreciate the help.

options.displayString: Either way, we need to go.

dialogText1:
Father, you can see what the Tal Shiar have done!

They'll need my help to get the transmitter working again. We'll take some weapons and armor before we leave.

Don't worry. I can handle myself.

Get gear and then go to the transmitter.
lastResponseDisplayString: Either way, we need to go.

Slamek! You're alive!

objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Tech from Colony

speaker: Veril
text: What happened to you?
rawLine: [837831779,20260719T230259,0,Veril@,@,,,NPC]What happened to you?

dialogText1:
Veril, you found me before those ... things did.

I tried to repair the transmitter, but it was pointless. As you can see, the controls are completely destroyed.

But it looks like you found some new friends.

options.displayString: Can we bypass the transmitter controls?

text:

selectedChoice: Yes, I heard you.

dialogText1:
Slamek, you're not helping.

What if we setup a bypass relay? If it works, we might be able to control the transmitter dish from Zden's shuttle or even our secondary console at home.
lastResponseDisplayString: Yes, I heard you.

options.displayString: We could also try my tricorder.

text:
Look up!
We've got to get out of here NOW!
rawLine:
[837831890,20260719T230450,0,@,@,,,Mission]Look up! 
We've got to get out of here NOW!

text: What kind of ship is that?!
rawLine: [837831900,20260719T230500,0,@,@,,,Mission]What kind of ship is that?!

text: We don't know. It attacked our colony on Virinat.
rawLine: [837831910,20260719T230510,0,@,@,,,Mission]We don't know. It attacked our colony on Virinat.

text: And now they're attacking here. We need to warn other colonies!
rawLine: [837831920,20260719T230520,0,@,@,,,Mission]And now they're attacking here. We need to warn other colonies!

speaker: Neral's clone
text: Scanning lifeforms.
rawLine: [837831924,20260719T230524,0,Neral's clone@,@,,,NPC]Scanning lifeforms.

objectives.rawDisplayText: <font style=Mission_Recruit>∆</font> Recover Iconian Tech from Colony

text: Believe it or not, that's what we're trying to do.
rawLine: [837831930,20260719T230530,0,@,@,,,Mission]Believe it or not, that's what we're trying to do.

speaker: Subcommander Scientist
text: There they are!
rawLine: [837831933,20260719T230533,0,Subcommander Scientist@,@,,,NPC]There they are!

speaker: Centurion
text: There they are!
rawLine: [837831933,20260719T230533,0,Centurion@,@,,,NPC]There they are!

dialogText1:
Were you able to repair the primary transmitter?

I set up a portable transmitter relay and gathered as many neighbors as I could. And I'm glad you found Slamek.

speaker: Zden
text:
Were you able to repair the primary transmitter?

I set up a portable transmitter relay and gathered as many neighbors as I could. And I'm glad you found Slamek.
rawLine:
[837831999,20260719T230639,0,Zden@,@,,,NPC]Were you able to repair the primary transmitter? 

I set up a portable transmitter relay and gathered as many neighbors as I could. And I'm glad you found Slamek.

selectedChoice: We need to evacuate immediately.

dialogText1:
I'm not going to argue. Our security field is down and the Tal Shiar are attacking the colony.

Hopefully everyone who hasn't already heard the message will realize what's happening and evacuate.

There are more people on the outskirts of town. If I can get to them in the shuttle, I may be able to get them to safety.
lastResponseDisplayString: We need to evacuate immediately.

options.displayString: We can beam everyone here up to our ship.

selectedChoice: We'll rendezvous in orbit.

dialogText1:
Father, I should go with you.

It took me weeks to repair the shuttle's drive system. If something goes wrong, you'll need me there.

text:

dialogText1:
You'll be safer on their ship. Slamek can help me if we run into trouble.

I'll broadcast the coordinates to every shuttle within range once we're in the air.

Now go. We need to look for survivors.

speaker: Slamek

objectives.displayText: Escort Zden and Slamek to Shuttle
objectives.rawDisplayText: Escort Zden and Slamek to Shuttle

dialogText1:
Sir, the Reman civilians are safely on board.

If you've done everything you can down there, we could use your help back up here.

More Tal Shiar ships are entering the system by the minute, and I don't think the Decimus can hold them off for long.

Return to your ship.

speaker: Ensign
text:
Sir, the Reman civilians are safely on board.

If you've done everything you can down there, we could use your help back up here. 

More Tal Shiar ships are entering the system by the minute, and I don't think the Decimus can hold them off for long. 

Return to your ship.
rawLine:
[837832067,20260719T230747,0,Ensign@,@,,,NPC]Sir, the Reman civilians are safely on board. 

If you've done everything you can down there, we could use your help back up here. 

More Tal Shiar ships are entering the system by the minute, and I don't think the Decimus can hold them off for long. 

Return to your ship.

speaker: Tovan Khev
text:
The Decimus has engaged the Tal Shiar and is forming a wedge so we can get the shuttles to the beacon.

The shuttles will be relying on us for protection. Without our help, they'll never make it out of here. 

Zden's shuttle was one of the ones that made it to the ship. He's hailing us.
rawLine:
[837832144,20260719T230904,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]The Decimus has engaged the Tal Shiar and is forming a wedge so we can get the shuttles to the beacon. 

The shuttles will be relying on us for protection. Without our help, they'll never make it out of here. 

Zden's shuttle was one of the ones that made it to the ship. He's hailing us.

speaker: Zden
text:
Admiral Neral, we're in position and ready to make a run for the beacon.

Is my daughter safe?
rawLine:
[837832165,20260719T230925,0,Zden@,@,,,NPC]Admiral Neral, we're in position and ready to make a run for the beacon. 

Is my daughter safe?

selectedChoice: Open a channel.

dialogText1:
Admiral Neral, we're in position and ready to make a run for the beacon.

Is my daughter safe?
lastResponseDisplayString: Open a channel.

speaker: Veril
text:
I'm making myself useful.

The singularity core on this ship is practically an antique. I'm keeping an eye on the power levels to make sure we don't blow apart in combat. 

Don't forget to put all the shuttle's power into the shields.
rawLine:
[837832166,20260719T230926,0,Veril@,@,,,NPC]I'm making myself useful. 

The singularity core on this ship is practically an antique. I'm keeping an eye on the power levels to make sure we don't blow apart in combat. 

Don't forget to put all the shuttle's power into the shields.

speaker: Zden
text:
Don't worry, my child. It was the first thing Slamek did.

Tell the Admiral that when we reach the beacon, we'll await the signal to warp to the rendezvous point. 

Once we're all safe, you can transfer back to the shuttle. 

Escort the shuttle to the beacon.

[837832167,20260719T230927,0,Zden@,@,,,NPC]Don't worry, my child. It was the first thing Slamek did.

text: Only a few enemy Warbirds remain. Protect the shuttles!
rawLine: [837832176,20260719T230936,0,@,@,,,Mission]Only a few enemy Warbirds remain. Protect the shuttles!

text: We've broken the blockade! All ships fall into formation.
rawLine: [837832187,20260719T230947,0,@,@,,,Mission]We've broken the blockade! All ships fall into formation.

dialogText1:
R.R.W. explicit profanities, we're reading an unknown ship near the beacon.

It appears to be a battleship. If it attacks, our ships will be completely outmatched.

Are you able to scan the vessel or determine its armaments?

options.displayString: No, but we've seen similar ships before.

speaker: Commander Khiy
text:
R.R.W. explicit profanities, we're reading an unknown ship near the beacon.

It appears to be a battleship. If it attacks, our ships will be completely outmatched. 

Are you able to scan the vessel or determine its armaments?

[837832215,20260719T231015,0,Commander Khiy@,@,,,NPC]R.R.W. explicit profanities, we're reading an unknown ship near the beacon.

selectedChoice: No, but we've seen similar ships before.

dialogText1:
They're emitting some sort of passive scanning field.

We cannot get a weapons lock and our singularity core power levels are fluctuating.
lastResponseDisplayString: No, but we've seen similar ships before.

speaker: Commander Khiy
text:
They're emitting some sort of passive scanning field.

We cannot get a weapons lock and our singularity core power levels are fluctuating.
rawLine:
[837832220,20260719T231020,0,Commander Khiy@,@,,,NPC]They're emitting some sort of passive scanning field. 

We cannot get a weapons lock and our singularity core power levels are fluctuating.

dialogText1:
I'm noticing the same power level variations. The field is definitely emanating from the enemy vessel.

If I tap into the beacon's controls, I may be able to send a high frequency proton burst that should disrupt the field long enough to get a weapons lock.

options.displayString: Fire the burst on my mark.

text: Try to stay behind the enemy ship. It has a deadly frontal assault weapon!

text: That's not exactly easy when it keeps jumping around!

text: We did it!

selectedChoice: How? Did we miss something?

dialogText1:
Logs show that a cruiser warped in during the fight with the battleship, stayed at long range and then decloaked briefly. They warped away less than a minute later.

They must have taken the colonists from the shuttles while we were in combat.
lastResponseDisplayString: How? Did we miss something?

selectedChoice: I'm sorry, Veril.

dialogText1:
We have to go after them! We need to track their trajectory and follow them!

They could still be alive and we can catch up if we hurry!
lastResponseDisplayString: I'm sorry, Veril.

options.displayString: Tovan, do we have any data on their heading?

dialogText1:
Nothing. There was too much interference from the battleship.

I wish I had better news, but we have more pressing matters.

The Decimus is hailing us, and we need to get out of this system while we still can.

selectedChoice: Onscreen

dialogText1:
Neral, we're aware of the situation, but we have to set a course for the rendezvous point immediately. There are other Remans there who will need our protection.

After we regroup, we will have time to fully understand what has happened here. And to mourn our losses.
lastResponseDisplayString: Onscreen

options.displayString: Join D'Tan's Fleet. We're stronger together.

dialogText1:
We appreciate the offer, but that isn't my call to make.

I'll relay your offer to Obisek and the rest of the fleet, but for now I think it would be best if we go our separate ways. When we understand more about what the Tal Shiar are after, perhaps that will change.

Thank you for your help. I know you tried your best.
lastResponseDisplayString: Join D'Tan's Fleet. We're stronger together.

text: "Crossroads at Crateris" complete!
rawLine: [837832297,20260719T231137,0,@,@,,,Mission]"Crossroads at Crateris" complete!

dialogText1:
I don't need anyone's permission. I'm coming with you and we're going to find my father.

In the meantime, if you expect to keep a ship this old from blowing apart at the seams, you're going to need an engineer.

Good thing I'm here.

text:

selectedChoice: Welcome aboard.

dialogText1:
I think we've done everything we can here. We should report what happened to Temer.

We can leave whenever you're ready.

Leave the system.
lastResponseDisplayString: Welcome aboard.

speaker: Tovan Khev
text:
I think we've done everything we can here. We should report what happened to Temer.

Leave the system.
rawLine:
[837832301,20260719T231141,0,Tovan Khev@,@,,,NPC]I think we've done everything we can here. We should report what happened to Temer.   

We can leave whenever you're ready. 

Leave the system.

speaker: Commander Temer
text:
We will reach out to the Remans, but it will be difficult to get over centuries of mistrust and abuse. Perhaps if this Obisek is willing to speak to us directly it might make a difference.

I know you did your best to help them, and that the attack could not have been anticipated. I'm very concerned about this sabotage you reported, however -- and that the culprit was never found. The Remans may very well have a Tal Shiar operative in their midst.  

We will not win every battle, but we will win the war. Count on that. 

Jolan tru.
rawLine:

We will not win every battle, but we will win the war. Count on that. 

Jolan tru.
